# cubrid-client

> Modern TypeScript-first client for the CUBRID database. Promise-based, fully typed API for Node.js 18+ applications.

cubrid-client provides a clean, typed wrapper around the CUBRID database for Node.js and TypeScript projects. It features generic query result typing, structured error classes, and transaction support.

Key facts:
- Install: `npm install cubrid-client`
- Connect: `createClient({ host: "localhost", port: 33000, database: "demodb", user: "dba" })`
- Query: `await db.query<User>("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?", [1])`
- Transactions: `await db.transaction(async (tx) => { await tx.query(...) })`
- Error classes: `ConnectionError`, `QueryError`, `TransactionError`
- ESM and CommonJS output
- Node.js 18+ support
- TypeScript-first with full generic type support

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-client/blob/main/README.md): Full API documentation, quick start, typed queries, transactions
- [Product Requirements](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-client/blob/main/PRD.md): Product requirements document with Example-first Design Philosophy

## Examples

- [Quick Start](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-client/blob/main/README.md#quick-start): Basic connection and query
- [Typed Queries](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-client/blob/main/README.md#typed-queries): Generic type parameter for query results
- [Transactions](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-client/blob/main/README.md#transactions): Isolated transactional connections with auto-rollback
- [CUBRID Cookbook — cubrid-client](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-cookbook/tree/main/node/cubrid): Production-ready examples — connect, CRUD, transactions

## API Reference

- [Source — create-client.ts](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-client/blob/main/src/client/create-client.ts): Client factory function
- [Source — client.ts](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-client/blob/main/src/client/client.ts): Client class with query and close methods
- [Source — transaction.ts](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-client/blob/main/src/client/transaction.ts): Transaction implementation

## Ecosystem

- [drizzle-cubrid](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/drizzle-cubrid): Drizzle ORM dialect for CUBRID (uses cubrid-client as driver)
- [cubrid-cookbook](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-cookbook): Production-ready examples across Python, Node.js, and Go
- [CUBRID](https://www.cubrid.org/): The CUBRID database
